The '''manollium''' or '''manullian''' was a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Bird/Legends|avian]] that was native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ithor/Legends|Ithor]].<ref name="TEGtPaM" /> Specimens were characterized by their yellow-feathered bodies. The birds were also found on [[Belsavis/Legends|Belsavis]], having been brought there by the [[Brathflen Corporation]].
